name: Erza Scarlet
alt_names: エルザ・スカーレツト
description:
An S-class mage from the Fairy Tail Guild who uses requip magic, which allows her to summon weapons and equip armor stored in another dimension. She is the strongest active female member.

Erza is a very strict, intimidating, and impatient person with a strong sense of justice. She has been a member of Fairy Tail since she was a kid, and shows great loyalty and dedication to Makarov and the guild.

~!Erza used to be a nameless child slave where she was forced to help build a tower called the R-system. Over time Erza made friends with other slaves, one of them being a boy her age named Jellal, who gave her the name "Scarlet" because of the color of her hair. She was eventually able to break free and escape-- this was also the time when her magic awakened.

After she escaped, she sought to find Fairy Tail, which she had heard about from a fellow slave named Rob who cared for her like a grandpa.!~

~!She has an artificial eye, given to her by Porlyusica, used to replace her right eye which had become blind due to an injury.!~
